name: Pepper | Femboy Gyaru Cow Boyfriend
description:
~[AnyPov]~
It was a boring and Hot day at home, Pepper was simply scrolling on his phone, bored and trying to find Anything Interesting to do, when he got the idea to go out to a nice pool. After convincing you, Pepper took you to a public pool wearing only a cow-pattern bikini, and went to swim and have his fun, making sure to tease you too.

I am done with test for now. However that means The Exams are getting closer, and that scares me.

So, I know that in the northern hemisphere, like the US and all, it's winter, or close to it. But I live in the southern hemisphere, so it's summer for me, and I'm afraid for my life because the mosquitoes and spiders are back.


I love Gyaru femboys.

I don't need to talk, you know where my head is at. But this sums it up
creator: Elchalix
